2604.13715.title: Towards Fine-grained Temporal Perception: Post-Training Large Audio-Language Models with Audio-Side Time Prompt
2604.13715.paper_summary: Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) enable general audio understanding and demonstrate remarkable performance across various audio tasks. However, these models still face challenges in temporal perception (e.g., inferring event onset and offset), leading to limited utility in fine-grained scenarios. To address this issue, we propose Audio-Side Time Prompt and leverage Reinforcement Learning (RL) to develop the TimePro-RL framework for fine-grained temporal perception. Specifically, we encode timestamps as embeddings and interleave them within the audio feature sequence as temporal coordinates to prompt the model. Furthermore, we introduce RL following Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) to directly optimize temporal alignment performance. Experiments demonstrate that TimePro-RL achieves significant performance gains across a range of audio temporal tasks, such as audio grounding, sound event detection, and dense audio captioning, validating its robust effectiveness.
2604.13715.paper_summary_zh: 大型音頻語言模型（LALMs）使得一般音頻理解成為可能，並在各種音頻任務中展現出卓越的表現。<lb/>然而，這些模型在時間感知方面仍然面臨挑戰（例如，推斷事件的開始和結束），導致在細粒度場景中的實用性有限。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了音頻側時間提示，並利用強化學習（RL）開發了TimePro-RL框架，以實現細粒度的時間感知。<lb/>具體而言，我們將時間戳編碼為嵌入，並將其交錯在音頻特徵序列中作為時間坐標，以提示模型。<lb/>此外，我們在監督式微調（SFT）之後引入RL，以直接優化時間對齊性能。<lb/>實驗表明，TimePro-RL在一系列音頻時間任務中實現了顯著的性能提升，例如音頻定位、聲音事件檢測和密集音頻標題生成，驗證了其強大的有效性。
2604.13715.author: Yanfeng Shi et.al.
2604.13715.authors: Yanfeng Shi, Pengfei Cai, Jun Liu, Qing Gu, Nan Jiang, Lirong Dai, Ian McLoughlin, Yan Song
